---
title: "01 — Download American Stories Data"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
```

## Download American Stories (1774–1960)

Download article-level data year by year via Python `datasets` library,
then save each year as a Parquet file.

```{r download}
library(reticulate)
library(arrow)

use_python(PYTHON_EXE, required = TRUE)
datasets <- import("datasets")

# Determine which years still need downloading
existing <- gsub("articles_|\\.parquet", "",
                 list.files(DATA_PARQUET, pattern = "^articles_\\d{4}\\.parquet$"))
to_download <- setdiff(YEARS_ALL, existing)

message(length(to_download), " years to download. ",
        length(existing), " already done.")

if (length(to_download) > 0) {
  # Process in batches of 10 years to manage memory
  batches <- split(to_download, ceiling(seq_along(to_download) / 10))

  for (i in seq_along(batches)) {
    batch <- batches[[i]]
    message("\n=== Batch ", i, "/", length(batches),
            ": years ", batch[1], "-", batch[length(batch)], " ===")

    tryCatch({
      ds <- datasets$load_dataset(
        "dell-research-harvard/AmericanStories",
        "subset_years",
        year_list = as.list(batch),
        trust_remote_code = TRUE
      )

      # Each year is a split in the dataset
      for (yr in names(ds)) {
        message("  Converting year ", yr, "...")
        year_data <- ds[[yr]]

        # Convert to pandas then to R data.frame
        pdf <- year_data$to_pandas()
        df <- as.data.frame(pdf)

        if (nrow(df) > 0) {
          outpath <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, paste0("articles_", yr, ".parquet"))
          write_parquet(df, outpath)
          message("  Saved ", nrow(df), " articles -> ", outpath)
        } else {
          message("  Year ", yr, " has 0 articles, skipping.")
        }
      }

      # Free memory
      rm(ds, pdf, df)
      gc()

    }, error = function(e) {
      message("  ERROR in batch ", i, ": ", conditionMessage(e))
      # Try individual years in the batch
      for (yr in batch) {
        tryCatch({
          outpath <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, paste0("articles_", yr, ".parquet"))
          if (file.exists(outpath)) next

          message("  Retrying year ", yr, " individually...")
          ds_single <- datasets$load_dataset(
            "dell-research-harvard/AmericanStories",
            "subset_years",
            year_list = list(yr),
            trust_remote_code = TRUE
          )
          pdf <- ds_single[[yr]]$to_pandas()
          df <- as.data.frame(pdf)
          if (nrow(df) > 0) {
            write_parquet(df, outpath)
            message("    Saved ", nrow(df), " articles for ", yr)
          }
          rm(ds_single, pdf, df)
          gc()
        }, error = function(e2) {
          message("    FAILED year ", yr, ": ", conditionMessage(e2))
        })
      }
    })
  }
}
```

## Summary

```{r summary}
parquet_files <- list.files(DATA_PARQUET, pattern = "^articles_\\d{4}\\.parquet$",
                            full.names = TRUE)
message("Total Parquet files: ", length(parquet_files))

# Show file sizes
info <- file.info(parquet_files)
info$year <- gsub(".*articles_(\\d{4})\\.parquet", "\\1", rownames(info))
info$size_mb <- round(info$size / 1e6, 1)
message("Total size: ", round(sum(info$size) / 1e9, 2), " GB")

# Show first/last years
cat("Years available:", sort(info$year)[1], "to",
    sort(info$year)[length(info$year)], "\n")
```
